behavior_summary: llmWiki.enabled = false -> disable backend helper-model API calls. Semantic CLI commands fail unless an explicit prompt/bundle emission flag is used.
llmWiki.enabled = true -> use models[0] as the backend helper LLM for strict compile/query workflows.

This file does not switch the surrounding Codex/ChatGPT conversation to a different model. Agent-mediated chat-LLM processing must be explicit: emit the bundle/prompt, let the chat agent process it, then save a proposal or reviewed page intentionally.

_enabled_meaning.false: No helper-model API calls from local scripts. Use --emit-bundle or --emit-selection-prompt when a chat agent should inspect the prompt explicitly.
_enabled_meaning.true: Enable backend-only helper-model API calls through models[0].

models.title: Cheap Helper Chat Model
models._note: Current code uses models[0] only. Provider must currently be 'openai', but apiBase may point to any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

embeddingsProvider._note: Parsed by the loader but not required by the strict compile/query path.

rerankerProvider._note: Parsed by the loader but not required by the strict compile/query path.
